ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of travel (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number or location */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "fare_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare was paid */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage the passenger was on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class quality and services */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers per class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Range of prices for the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number or location of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of travel */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passengers (male or female) */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers */,
  "survival_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of passengers who survived */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage for which the survival rate is calculated */,
  "port" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passengers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_rates_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_rates_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class of the ticket purchased */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "fare_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the fare */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage for which the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the voyage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the voyage */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "total_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the voyage in days */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the captain of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., IT, Analytics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
